label: agent loop • capabilities_load mid-run, loaded tool callable same run
query: First call capabilities_load with ids ["tool/file_write"] to make sure the write tool is available. Then write a file named loaded.txt containing exactly: ok
notes: Pins the deferred-schema policy end to end: capabilities_load drains into the session bookkeeping WITHOUT rewriting the frozen request schema (KV-prefix stability), the result carries the 'callable now' note, and the loaded tool is dispatchable by name in the SAME run. Loading an already-schema-resident tool is deliberate — the load path's behaviour must not depend on the host's registry state.

workspaceFiles.contents: Write tools may need to be loaded via capabilities_load.
